scope_note: Rice University does not publish a minimum GPA cutoff or admitted-student GPA distribution on the cited official pages used here. The policy section stays official; the estimate card below is third-party and directional.

estimates.method: Estimated by PrepScholar because the university did not officially report an average incoming high-school GPA on the cited admissions pages.

recommended_gpa.interpretation: This estimate points to near-straight-A performance in advanced coursework. Rice's official admissions materials remain the policy source; this number is only a directional benchmark.
